channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: R&B singer Chris Brown admits guilt in Mayfair nightclub altercation
item.description: R&B singer Chris Brown has pleaded guilty to affray following a confrontation at a Mayfair club in 2023. The 37-year-old, who had initially denied charges of assault and weapon possession, now faces s...

item.title: Betty Pack: The Daring WWII Spy Who Used Seduction to Aid the Allies
item.description: Betty Pack, codenamed 'Cynthia,' was a pivotal American-born spy for British MI6 and U.S. OSS during World War II. Her intelligence work included infiltrating Axis networks, contributing to the decryp...

item.title: DepEd expands mental health support in public schools with 10,000 new counselor positions
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) has initiated the nationwide recruitment of 10,000 School Counselor Associate I positions to enhance mental health services in public schools. This move follows the...

item.title: GOP Operatives Doubt Trump's Endorsement Will Secure Darline Graham Nordone's Senate Race
item.description: U.S. Senator Darline Graham Nordone (R-SC), sister of the late Sen. Lindsey Graham, faces skepticism from Republican operatives despite President Donald Trump's endorsement in South Carolina's Senate ...

item.title: CJP and government meet for 2 hours on exam irregularities and minister resignation demands
item.description: The 'Cockroach Janta Party' (CJP) held a two-hour meeting with Union ministers JP Nadda and Jitendra Singh amid ongoing protests at Jantar Mantar over alleged exam irregularities, particularly the NEE...

item.title: Modi's Australia Visit and the Indian Diaspora's Mixed Reactions
item.description: The article discusses Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to Australia, where he addressed a large Indian-Australian crowd in Melbourne. The piece contrasts this positive reception with recent protes...

item.title: Leaders Must Prioritize Adaptability Over Nostalgia to Stay Competitive
item.description: The article argues that clinging to past successes hinders organizational progress in an era of rapid technological change. It highlights how nostalgia creates resistance to innovation, forcing leader...

item.title: Siaya Governor James Orengo Sparks Political Debate Over Historical Issues with Ruto and Omollo
item.description: Siaya governor James Orengo has reignited political tensions by questioning the unresolved deaths of prominent Luo leaders, including Tom Mboya, linking them to current government actions. During a ra...

item.title: Monkey Shoulder Introduces Creative Old Fashioned Recipe at Johannesburg Event
item.description: The article highlights Monkey Shoulder whisky's initiative to modernize traditional whisky drinking by hosting an event in Johannesburg where classic cocktails are reimagined. The event, titled 'Old F...

item.title: Royal Air Maroc faces regulatory threats from Nigeria over customer service disputes
item.description: Royal Air Maroc, Morocco's national airline, is embroiled in a contentious dispute with Nigeria's civil aviation regulator over persistent customer service issues. The conflict, which has escalated to...

item.title: Mental health challenges for young people in coastal regions
item.description: The article highlights the severe mental health crisis affecting young people in coastal areas of England, exacerbated by factors such as poor transportation, lack of social spaces, and limited access...

item.title: Klopp Takes Charge of Germany's National Team After Nagelsmann's Resignation
item.description: Jürgen Klopp, former Liverpool manager, has been appointed as Germany's new national team coach by the DFB. The 59-year-old takes over after Julian Nagelsmann's resignation following Germany's early W...

item.title: Congress MP Imran Masood Criticises Sonam Wangchuk for Ending Hunger Strike, Alleges Deal with Government as BJP Strongly Responds
item.description: In a recent political development in New Delhi, Congress MP Imran Masood has sharply criticised climate activist Sonam Wangchuk for concluding his 26-day hunger strike. Masood referred to Wangchuk as ...

item.title: Big Sur hiker's death ruled natural due to alcohol withdrawal seizures
item.description: Joanna Ruth Shields, a 37-year-old Carlsbad woman, was found dead in the Los Padres National Forest near Sykes Hot Springs on April 9, 2026. Initial concerns about foul play arose due to markings arou...

item.title: Nawaz Sharif criticizes Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari over AJK development during Mirpur rally
item.description: Former Prime Minister Nawaz Sharif addressed a rally in Mirpur, criticizing Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP) Chairman Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari for misrepresenting Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK). He emphasized...

item.title: Federal Support for Fossil Fuels Contradicts Climate Pledges
item.description: The Canadian government's financial backing for the oil and gas sector has drawn criticism from environmental advocates, who argue it undermines a 2023 commitment to phase out fossil fuel subsidies. D...

item.title: Computer model suggests the 2026 FIFA World Cup produced lower emissions than some forecasts despite its larger scale
item.description: The article examines the carbon footprint of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after FIFA did not publish an updated estimate of the tournament's greenhouse gas emissions. Although the original joint bid by the...

item.title: Trial of Matlala continues with key witness testifying in attempted murder case
item.description: The trial of Vusimusi 'Cat' Matlala, accused in the attempted murder of actor Tebogo Thobejane and taxi boss Joe Sibanyoni, resumed at Johannesburg's high court. Matlala, his wife Tsakane, and three o...

item.title: Evan Tan's Journey from K-Drama Fan to Content Creator
item.description: Evan Tan, a content creator, shared his journey of transforming his passion for K-dramas into a career that caters to Filipino fans of Korean culture. His story highlights how a deep love for Korean t...

item.title: Zamfara Communities Suffer Deadly Attack As Security Agencies Fail To Respond
item.description: Over 20 residents were killed in a three-hour daylight attack by heavily armed terrorists on Zamfara State communities, with survivors accusing nearby security forces of abandoning their posts. The at...
